title: Academic Advising Advisor Assignments
content:
ACADEMIC ADVISING - MORGAN STATE COMPUTER SCIENCE DEPARTMENT

HOW TO FIND YOUR ADVISOR:
Academic advisors in the Computer Science Department are assigned based on the first letter of your last name.
It is extremely important to meet with your academic advisor each semester for advisement.
Your advisor provides guidance on class selection, internships, research, and other key resources.
Registration pins are needed for class registration - only the assigned advisor can provide the registration pin.

COMPUTER SCIENCE ADVISOR ASSIGNMENTS BY LAST NAME:

Last name starts with A: Your academic advisor is Dr. Md Rahman

Last name starts with B: Your academic advisor is Dr. Monireh Dabaghchian

Last name starts with C: Your academic advisor is Dr. Eric Sakk

Last name starts with D, E, or F: Your academic advisor is Dr. Vahid Heydari

Last name starts with G: Your academic advisor is Dr. Guobin Xu

Last name starts with H: Your academic advisor is Dr. Jamell Dacon

Last name starts with I, J, K, or L: Your academic advisor is Dr. Naja Mack

Last name starts with M: Your academic advisor is Dr. Timothy Oladunni or Adetifa Oluwole

Last name starts with N: Your academic advisor is Dr. Sam Tannouri

Last name starts with O: Your academic advisor is Dr. Jin Guo

Last name starts with P, Q, or R: Your academic advisor is Ms. Grace Steele

Last name starts with S: Your academic advisor is Dr. Vojislav Stojkovic

Last name starts with T: Your academic advisor is Dr. Amjad Ali

Last name starts with U, V, W, X, Y, or Z: Your academic advisor is Dr. Roshan Paudel

CLOUD COMPUTING ADVISOR ASSIGNMENTS:

Last name A through O: Your academic advisor is Dr. Radhouane Chouchane (Radwan Shushane)
Last name P through Z: Your academic advisor is Dr. Blessing Ojeme

ADVISING CONTACT EMAILS:
All SCMNS Freshmen: SCMNS-Retention@morgan.edu
Cloud Computing: compsci@morgan.edu
Computer Science: compsci@morgan.edu
